title: dicliptera harlingii
intro: Dicliptera harlingii, also known as Harling's dicliptera or tropical red lips, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is native to New Guinea and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dicliptera harlingii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Dicliptera harlingii can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
